description:
Specification

Product Information

Product Type :Single Box Product

Product Name:Small Vanity Desk with Mirror and Lights, Makeup Vanity Table with LED Mirror, 3 Lighting Modes, Power Outlet, Drawer, Open Shelves and Cushioned Stool for Bedroom (White and Black)

Main Color:White+Black

Main Material:Metal+Synthetic Wood+Mirror

Product Dimensions

Assembled Length (in.):31.50

Assembled Width (in.):16.50

Assembled Height (in.):51.20

Product Weight (lbs.):49.90

Package Size Outer Package Images

Length (in.):34.40

Width (in.):20.90

Height (in.):8.00

Weight (lbs.):55.60

Product Features

  • 【LED Mirror with 3 Lighting Modes】Equipped with a smart LED mirror featuring 3 adjustable lighting modes (warm, natural, and white), this small vanity helps you achieve flawless makeup under any lighting condition. Touch control makes switching light easy and intuitive.
  • 【Built-in Power Outlet for Convenience】 The vanity table includes a built-in power outlet with USB ports, allowing you to charge your phone, tablet, or beauty tools while getting ready. Say goodbye to messy extension cords in your bedroom.
  • 【Smooth Sliding Drawer & Open Storage Shelves】Keep your makeup, skincare, and jewelry organized with a spacious drawer and 3 open shelves. This vanity desk offers both hidden and display storage, perfect for daily use.
  • 【Compact Size for Small Spaces】Designed as a small vanity table, it’s ideal for bedrooms, apartments, or dorms. The space-saving layout maximizes functionality without taking up too much room.
  • 【Comfortable Cushioned Stool 】Comes with a matching padded stool that provides comfort during your beauty routine. The sleek, modern design complements any bedroom décor.
